title: nicotiana corymbosa var. australis
intro: Nicotiana corymbosa var. australis, commonly known as the Tasmanian flower or sweet tobacco, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family that is native to Australia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Nicotiana corymbosa var. australis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
